response.step_by_step_log: 1. Watched the video and noted the structure: Intro (00:00-00:43), Performance (00:43-03:39), Outro (03:39-05:01). 2. Performer identified as ReGLOSS. 3. Used lyrics fragments from the performance (00:46) to search for the song title: '神彩の花びら' and then narrowed it down by searching for 'ReGLOSS Sakura Mirage lyrics'. 4. Identified song as 'サクラミラージュ' (Sakura Mirage) by OHTORA and New K. 5. Searched for full lyrics for 'サクラミラージュ' and retrieved them. 6. Constructed the final JSON response with the detected scenes, song metadata, and full lyrics.
response.global_summary: The video captures a live stage performance by the VTuber group ReGLOSS. It includes an introductory greeting, a full performance of their song 'Sakura Mirage', and concluding banter with the audience.

scenes.description: The video begins with the four members of ReGLOSS—Otonose Kanade, Ichijou Ririka, Juufuutei Raden, and Todoroki Hajime—being introduced on stage.
The stage lights dim and the performers prepare for the performance.
ReGLOSS performs their song 'Sakura Mirage'. Members sing and dance while illuminated by stage lighting.
scenes.song_title: サクラミラージュ (Sakura Mirage)
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:

柔らかな風 ほら、春めいて 共鳴するファンファーレ

桜花爛漫 染める桃色 別れの予感はソメイヨシノ I'll be there, I'll be there, I'll be there, I'll be there for you 一閃 浴びて Dance with me now!!

音も立てず交わす キミとのコントラスト その余白はいつかのため Save the best for last

小さく 震えた Lip 噛み締める まだ微熱の Real

本音の Speaker ダイレクトな Weaver 解き放て On my mind
